attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
 NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
 NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 NXOA.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 NXOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NXOA.BK_COMPANY_CD,
 NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 NXOA.GL_DT,
 NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT,
 NXOA.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
 NXOA.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
 NXOA.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
 NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 NXOA.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
 NXOA.TRX_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CONV_DT, 
 NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 NXOA.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT,
 NXOA.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT,
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION_CNT,
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 NXOA.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 NXOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
 NXOA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NXOA.TRX_CLASS_CD,
 NXOA.SS_CD,
  WI.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,		  
  NXOA.PRODUCT_QTY,
  NXOA.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA   INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WI
   ON (WI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY) 
   WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_OA_S NCR 
   WHERE NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)

SELECT 
    WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
    WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
    WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,  
    CASE WHEN  ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') 
	             OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
        ELSE
        CASE WHEN  CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
          THEN WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
          ELSE NULL      
        END
      END
       ELSE WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
    
    CASE  WHEN  ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
	              OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN WNRTC_1.GL_DATE       
        ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
            THEN WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
         END
      END
    ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
    
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OA_S WNRTC_1    
    ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNRTC_1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
     INNER JOIN (SELECT WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNICE_P 
	 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE WNICE_P1	
	 ON WNICE_P.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WNICE_P1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
	 WHERE WNICE_P1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA1 /*NRS PI4 Change */
  ON WNRTC_1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
  AND NXOA1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' /*NRS PI4 Change ends */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
     ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
     AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1	 
	INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            = NATL. AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 	
    WHERE
     WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM' 
     AND (WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN') 
 
  UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
    WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
    WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
    WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,  
    CASE WHEN ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
	            OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/  /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/  
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
        ELSE
        CASE WHEN  CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
          THEN WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
          ELSE NULL      
        END
      END
       ELSE WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
    
    CASE  WHEN ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') 
	              OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/   
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN WNRTC_1.GL_DATE       
        ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
            THEN WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
         END
      END
    ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
    
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OA_S WNRTC_1    
    ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNRTC_1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
     INNER JOIN (SELECT WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
	 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNICE_P
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE WNICE_P1  ON WNICE_P.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WNICE_P1.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   
	 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
     ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
     AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
	 
	INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            = NATL. AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	
    WHERE
     WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM' 
     AND (WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')   
 
 UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
    WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
    WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,  
    CASE WHEN ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
	             OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
        ELSE
        CASE WHEN  CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
          THEN WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
          ELSE NULL      
        END
      END
       ELSE WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
    
    CASE  WHEN ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') 
	             OR ( WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
	THEN
      CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN WNRTC_1.GL_DATE       
        ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
            THEN WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
         END
      END
    ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
    
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OA_S WNRTC_1    
    ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNRTC_1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
     INNER JOIN (SELECT WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
	 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNICE_P INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE WNICE_P1	
	 ON WNICE_P.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WNICE_P1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
     WHERE WNICE_P1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='Y'  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA1 /*NRS PI4 Change */
  ON WNRTC_1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
  AND NXOA1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='Y' /*NRS PI4 Change ends */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
     ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
     AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1 	 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            = NATL. AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 	
    WHERE
     WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM' 
     AND (WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')

SELECT 
   NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
   'REV',
   NXOA.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   NXOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NXOA.BK_COMPANY_CD,
   ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   NXOA.GL_DT,
   NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT,
   NXOA.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
   NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,  
   NXOA.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
   NXOA.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
   NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
   NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
   NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   NXOA.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
   NXOA.TRX_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CONV_DT, 
   (NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   (NXOA.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-NXOA.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
   NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION_CNT,
   NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
   NXOA.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
   NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
   -7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   NULL AS  CONTEXT,
   EAMPD.FISCAL_ID ,
   EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
   NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
   NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
   ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
   ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
   NXOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
   NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
   NXOA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   NXOA.TRX_CLASS_CD,
   NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
   NXOA.SS_CD,
   NXOA1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
   NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NXOA.PRODUCT_QTY
   FROM
   $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
   ON NXOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
   ON NXOA.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON  NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
   ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY	 
INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA INNER JOIN 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='XAAS'
  AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
   ON NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
   WHERE NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
   AND NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
   AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
   AND NXOA.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
   AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
   WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
   AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0 
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))
   AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
   WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
   AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))
   
   UNION ALL
   SELECT 
   EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
   'REV',
   EXNRC.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   EXNRC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   EXNRC.BK_COMPANY_CD,
   ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
   EXNRC.GL_DT,
   EXNRC.GL_POSTED_DT,
   EXNRC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
   NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE, 
   EXNRC.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
   EXNRC.DEAL_ID,
   EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
   NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
   EXNRC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   EXNRC.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
   EXNRC.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
   (EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   (EXNRC.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-EXNRC.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) AS AMOUNT,
   EXNRC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
   EXNRC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
   EXNRC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
   EXNRC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
   -7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   NULL AS  CONTEXT,
   EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
   EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
   NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
   NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
   NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
   ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
   ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
   EXNRC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
   NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
   EXNRC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   EXNRC.TRX_CLASS_CD,
   NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
   EXNRC.SS_CODE,
   NXOA1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
   EXNRC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   EXNRC.PRODUCT_QTY
    FROM
     $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
     $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_REV_CUR_EXP_OA_S EXNRC
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
   ON EXNRC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
   ON EXNRC.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON  EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
   ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = EXNRC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
 INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA INNER JOIN 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='XAAS'
  AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
   ON EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
     WHERE EXNRC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
   AND EXNRC.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
   AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'   AND  NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
   AND EXNRC.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
   AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
   WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV' 
   AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))
   AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
   WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
   AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))

   WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
 COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  'I' as ACTION_CODE,   
  NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_ID,
  NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
  NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
  WNRTC.AMOUNT,
  1 as BATCH_ID ,     
  NULL        as BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  NULL        as BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  NULL         as COGS_PERCENT,
  NULL         as COMMENTS,
  WNRTC.CONTEXT      as CONTEXT,
  current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
  1         as CREATED_BY,
  current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
  -9999 CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  COALESCE(NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,-9999) AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  COALESCE(NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,-9999) AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG    AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  NULL       AS  EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
  'REV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID, 
  'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
  WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
  current_timestamp(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
  WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
  WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT     AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
  NULL as GROUPING_ID,
  NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  WNRTC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD      AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
  NULL        AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
  NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
  current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
  NULL        AS LINE_PERCENT,
  SC_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,  
  NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       AS LINE_TYPE,
  NULL        AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 NULL AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
  -7777  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID  , 
  -9999    AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
  WNRTC.ORG_ID     AS ORG_ID,
  NULL        AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  NULL        AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  COALESCE(NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,'=')      AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
  NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
  0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
  NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
  CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
    ELSE 999   
  END AS REQUEST_ID,
  COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
 COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
 COALESCE(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0) AS   SALESREP_ID ,  
  NULL       AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  NULL      AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  NULL      AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE ,  
  SC_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,    
  COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0) AS TERRITORY_ID ,  
   CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
   END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
  'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
  WNRTC.PRODUCT_QTY as TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
  WNRTC.TRX_DATE    AS TRX_DATE,
  NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER     AS TRX_NUMBER,
  WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD      AS TRX_TYPE,
  NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
  NULL      AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
  'REV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
  SC_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
  SC_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
  SC_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
  FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNRTC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_ACCT_RULE_OA_S WNGAR
   ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
   ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
   ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY )
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
     ON  CAST(WNRTC.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE    
   /*Q1FY18: ADDED BELOW JOINS FOR XAAS SALES CREDIT IMPLEMENTATION*/
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_S WSCF
   ON WSCF.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS SC_XAAS
    ON  SC_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	AND SC_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD=WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
    -- AND SC_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0
   /* AND (SC_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000)*/ /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
  /* FOR DERIVATION OF SALESREP_ID,TERRITORY_ID AND SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID*/
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
   ON ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = SC_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
   ON SC_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
   
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC
   ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
             ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
              END =MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) 
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC  ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
   /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP   ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2                ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES')) AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME*/
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS    
 ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM 
AND  ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2                
  ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

   WHERE 
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'

 WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD      AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL      AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'REV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,   
 'UNKNOWN' SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
  WNRTC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OA_S WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON WNRTC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_ACCT_RULE_OA_S WNGAR
  ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
  ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
  ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY )
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
    ON  CAST(WNRTC.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
/*Q1FY18: ADDED BELOW JOINS FOR XAAS SALES CREDIT IMPLEMENTATION*/
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_S WSCF
   ON WSCF.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 WHERE 
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT 
  NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY    AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
  'REV',
  NXOA.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  NXOA.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  NXOA.GL_DT,
  NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT,
  NXOA.TRXL_CURR_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,  
  NXOA.BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
  NXOA.BK_DEAL_ID,
  NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
  NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
  NXOA.REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
  NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT, 
  CASE WHEN NXOA.ATTRIB_CD = 'BIB' THEN (NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) 
     WHEN NXOA.ATTRIB_CD = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) ELSE 0 END    AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   CASE WHEN NXOA.ATTRIB_CD = 'BIB' THEN (NXOA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT-NXOA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT) 
     WHEN NXOA.ATTRIB_CD = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (NXOA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT-NXOA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT) ELSE 0 END AS AMOUNT,
  NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT,
  NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  NXOA.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
  -7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NULL AS  CONTEXT,
  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID ,
  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
  NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
  ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
  NXOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
  NXOA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NXOA.TRX_CLASS_CD,
  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  NXOA.SS_CD,
   NXOA1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
   NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NXOA.PRDT_INVOICED_QTY
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA
   
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON NXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
  ON NXOA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON  NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
   FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 

INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='XAAS'
  AND NXOA.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
   ON NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE NXOA.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  AND NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
  AND NXOA.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
  AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 
)
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
  AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET')
)
  
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
  EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
  'REV',
  EXNRC.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  EXNRC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  EXNRC.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  EXNRC.GL_DT,
  EXNRC.GL_POSTED_DT,
  EXNRC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE, 
  EXNRC.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
  EXNRC.DEAL_ID,
  EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
  EXNRC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
  EXNRC.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
  EXNRC.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
   CASE WHEN EXNRC.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB' THEN (EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) 
     WHEN EXNRC.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-EXNRC.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) ELSE 0 END    AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   CASE WHEN EXNRC.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB' THEN (EXNRC.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-EXNRC.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) 
     WHEN EXNRC.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (EXNRC.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-EXNRC.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) ELSE 0 END AS AMOUNT,
  EXNRC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
  EXNRC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  EXNRC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  EXNRC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
  -7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NULL AS  CONTEXT,
  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
  NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
  ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT     AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
  EXNRC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
  EXNRC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  EXNRC.TRX_CLASS_CD,
  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  EXNRC.SS_CODE,
   NXOA1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
   EXNRC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   EXNRC.PRODUCT_QTY
   FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_REV_CUR_EXP_OA_S EXNRC
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON EXNRC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
  ON EXNRC.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON  EXNRC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = EXNRC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
 INNER JOIN 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='XAAS'
  AND NXOA.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
   ON EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE EXNRC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  AND EXNRC.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT'  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%'))) /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
  AND EXNRC.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV' 
  AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
  AND  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNRC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
  AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
  AND  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET'))
